steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage directly states why the kiwikiu is highly specialized: it “became highly specialized as it adapted to survive in a specific island habitat.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly matches the passage's explanation — adaptation to a specific habitat is why the kiwikiu became specialized. The other three either add unsupported details (isolation in A, cohabitation in C) or mistake a consequence for a cause (stressors in D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
